title: poa trinervis
intro: Poa trinervis, also known as Three-veined Meadow-grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used for centuries in traditional Maori medicine. The medicinal properties of Poa trinervis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil.
